name: 原子结构
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 原子与键 / Atoms & Bonding / Atoms & Bonding
curriculum_points: HS-PS1-1: Use the periodic table as a model to predict the relative properties of elements based on the patterns of electrons in the outermost energy level of atoms.
HS-PS1-8: Develop models to illustrate the changes in the composition of the nucleus of the atom and the energy released during the processes of fission, fusion, and radioactive decay.

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「原子结构」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-PS1-1: Use the periodic table as a model to predict the relative properties of elements based on the patterns of elec…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HS-PS1-8: Develop models to illustrate the changes in the composition of the nuc… 对理解「原子结构」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
